During the reporting period, the subject account [ACCT_588218] exhibited patterns consistent with Account Takeover (ATO-04). 75 transactions were executed via IMPS totalling approximately ₹2,004,760.00 within a compressed timeframe. SECTION 3 — TRANSACTION SUMMARY:
75 suspicious transactions identified totalling approximately ₹2,004,760.00. Transactions conducted via IMPS channel. Period: 2026-01-13 to 2026-01-30. Highest single transaction: ₹501,190.00.

SECTION 5 — PRIOR STR REFERENCES:
STR-19585, STR-99672: prior filings on record.

SECTION 6 — RECOMMENDED ACTION:
File STR with FIU-IND within 30 days of initial detection per PMLA 2002 §12. Implement account freeze pending investigation outcome. Initiate Enhanced Due Diligence review. Preserve all transaction records for minimum 5 years per PMLA record-keeping requirements.
